attributes.action: Don’t remove Churchill and others from UK bank notes.
attributes.background:
The Bank of England plans to remove famous historical UK persons from bank notes and replace them with animal images. Whilst claiming this is to “enhance security” a FOI request found that a DEI inspired survey of 119 wokerati was the real motivation.
We must not cede our history 
Keep Churchill

rejection.details:
Banknotes are the responsibility of the Bank of England, which is independent of the Government and Parliament.

You can find out how the Bank decides who/what will be on banknotes here:
https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/banknotes/banknote-characters
